text.title: EU Sovereign LLM Deployment Bundle Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether eu-sovereign-llm-deployment-bundle applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the workload EU-customer-facing AND classified high-risk OR sectoral overlay?

branch.conclusion: Apply EU-region-only deployment with deny-by-default egress.

example.description: When `yes AND data_must_stay_in_eea` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r1` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
